title: <div><font face=".AppleColorEmojiUI">5️⃣</font> Fate’s Intervention – A player w
content:
5️⃣ Fate’s Intervention – A player with a “destined” alignment has their fate revealed.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Ensures the game is unpredictable without being unfair.
✔ Gives students moments of high-stakes choices.
✔ Maintains thematic cohesion with literary and historical motifs.

📜 3. Faction Leadership & Internal Challenges

📜 Factions can now have structured leadership with skill-based challenges.

✔ Faction Leadership Mechanics:
• Factions start with a leader determined by GPA or another early semester metric.
• Once per cycle (3-4 weeks), a leadership challenge can occur.
• Players can attempt a literary or rhetorical challenge to overthrow the leader.

✔ Ways to Challenge Faction Leadership:
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 493 (chunk 493/555)
